prompt: Multiple microservices are experiencing cascading failures. I need to freeze the circuit breaker overrides that someone manually set, restore automatic circuit breaking, and hold all manual override capability until the incident is resolved. Design the hold with proper incident authority.

A machine learning model in production is making biased predictions for a protected demographic. Legal has requested an immediate hold on all automated decisions from this model. Predictions should be routed to human reviewers instead. Design the hold mechanism and audit trail.

During a merger, both companies' employee directories need to be frozen — no new accounts, no permission changes, no deprovisioning — until the combined IT team establishes a unified identity governance model. This hold affects two different identity providers.

A SaaS customer is 90 days overdue on payment. Our policy is to freeze their account but preserve their data for 30 days. Design the hold: what features are disabled, what data remains accessible (read-only), what notifications fire, and who can release the hold.

Our feature flag system was recently accessed by an unauthorized service account. I need to hold all feature flag changes across all environments while we audit who changed what. Current flag states should be frozen as-is. Design the emergency hold.

An automated trading system triggered a series of trades that may violate regulatory limits. Design an immediate hold that freezes the system's ability to execute trades, preserves all pending orders for regulatory review, and creates a tamper-proof audit log of the hold event.

Three different teams are trying to modify the same shared Terraform state simultaneously, causing drift. I need to hold all Terraform operations against that state file — no plan, no apply, no import — until we reconcile. Design a cooperative hold with notification to all affected teams.

A graduated intern's account still has elevated permissions from a temporary access grant. Their access needs to be frozen at the exact current permission set — no escalation possible — while HR processes their offboarding. If the hold takes more than 48 hours, auto-escalate to the security team.
